title: BFB Draft Size Poly Pads (Sold in pairs)
text: Cavallo BFB Poly Hoof Boot Pads – Sold in Pairs The Cavallo BFB Poly Pads are specifically designed for use with our BFB (Big Foot Boot) hoof boots, providing the extra comfort and protection larger-hoofed horses require. Crafted from a 6mm industrial-grade polymer compound, these pads deliver exceptional durability, cushion, and shock absorption. By absorbing impact and concussion, Cavallo BFB Poly Pads protect your horse’s hooves, joints, and legs from unnecessary strain, ensuring comfort and support whether your horse is in work, turnout, or rehabilitation. BFB Poly Pads are ideal for horses recovering from conditions such as laminitis, founder, navicular syndrome, thin soles, hoof cracks, side bone, stone bruising, and more. Their resilient design makes them especially effective for prolonged wear, including therapy and turnout, while still offering soft, cushioned comfort. By stimulating blood circulation and reducing concussion, Cavallo Poly Pads provide both therapeutic and performance benefits for your big-footed partner. For horses sized 0–6, please see the Cavallo Comfort Pads , which offer comparable cushioning and support. Features Removable insoles that add cushion, comfort, and support Made of a unique 6mm polymer compound Shock-absorbing design protects hooves and legs from concussion Fits into Cavallo BFB Hoof Boots sizes 7-10 Ideal for extra cushioning during t

title: BFB (Big Foot Boot) Pastern Wraps (Sold in pairs)
text: Cavallo BFB Pastern Wraps – Sold in Pairs Cavallo BFB Pastern Wraps provide an additional layer of protection for your horse’s pasterns and heel bulbs when using Cavallo BFB "Big Foot Boot" Hoof Boots. Made from soft yet durable neoprene, Cavallo BFB Pastern Wraps help prevent rubbing, chafing, or irritation, especially during the boot break-in period. They can also be used to improve the fit of your horse’s boots or to “snug up” the fit after a fresh trim. Pastern Wraps are ideal for horses with sensitive skin or those prone to rubbing during longer rides, turnout, or therapy. Designed to fit comfortably under Cavallo BFB Hoof Boot (size7-10), these wraps are easy to apply and secure in place with strong Velcro fastenings. Wrap around the pastern and follow the boot fastening steps below for added comfort and protection. Cavallo Pastern Wraps help prevent small rocks, sand, and debris from entering the boots during arena rides or turnout. They are highly recommended for high-stress boot use, such as barrel racing, jumping, turnout, and other demanding activities. For larger-boned horses or those with generous pasterns, Cavallo recommends sizing up to ensure a secure and comfortable fit. Features Provides added cushioning and protection against rubbing Helps improve boot fit Easy Velcro fastening system Fits Cavallo BFB Hoof Boots (sizes 7-10) Recommended during the break-in pe

title: High Tenacity Protection Pads - size 0-6 (Sold in pairs)
text: Cavallo High Tenacity Protection Pads – Sold in Pairs Cavallo High Tenacity Protection Pads are specially designed for use with metal shoes or studs, providing an essential layer of protection inside your Cavallo Hoof Boots. Made from a unique Kevlar-type anti-abrasion material, these pads shield both the boot sole and any additional insole pads from wear caused by metal nail heads or studs. Durable yet lightweight, Cavallo Protection Pads are an excellent choice for riders who boot over metal shoes and want to extend the life of their Cavallo Hoof Boots. By preventing friction and abrasion inside the boot, Protection Pads help maintain both comfort and performance, even during regular use on challenging terrain. These pads are sold in pairs and are designed to be custom-cut for a perfect fit. Suitable for all Cavallo Hoof Boot styles in sizes 0–6, Regular or Slim Sole. Cavallo recommends using Cavallo Protection Pads any time you boot over metal shoes or studs. They safeguard your boots, protect pad inserts, and maximize the lifespan of your Cavallo Hoof Boots. Features Removable insoles that add cushion, comfort, and support Made from a Kevlar-type anti-abrasion material Protects boot soles and pads from wear caused by metal nail heads and studs Extends the life of Cavallo Hoof Boots when used over shoes Lightweight and durable for long-lasting performance Custom cut to fit C

title: Comfort Pads (Sold in pairs)
text: Cavallo Comfort Pads – Sold in Pairs The Cavallo Comfort Pad is a versatile hoof boot insole designed to deliver the ultimate combination of cushion, comfort, and durability. Made from a unique polymer compound, these pads absorb shock and concussion, protecting your horse’s hooves, joints, and legs from unnecessary strain. Whether used for riding, turnout, or therapy, Comfort Pads provide reliable relief and support in every step. Comfort Pads are ideal for horses in work and those undergoing rehabilitation from laminitis, founder, navicular syndrome, thin soles, stone bruising, and more . Their durable design makes them extremely effective in situations requiring prolonged wear, such as turnout or long-term therapy, while still providing soft, cushioned support. Cavallo Comfort Pads stimulate blood circulation and increase shock absorption, offering additional therapeutic benefits. For horses in hoof rehab, Comfort Pads are our top recommendation for daily comfort and ongoing support. Features Removable insoles that add cushion, comfort, and support Made of a unique 5 mm polymer compound (weight: 0.275 kg per pair) Shock-absorbing design protects hooves and legs from concussion Fits into all Cavallo Hoof Boots sizes 0–6 Can be doubled for extra cushioning during therapy or heavy riding Useful for improving boot fit and protecting soles Excellent for added comfort during trave

title: Cavallo "Cute Little Boot" CLB Cushion Pads (Sold in pairs)
text: Cavallo CLB Cushion Pads – Sold in Pairs Cavallo CLB Cushion Pads are Cavallo’s softest hoof boot pads, designed to deliver maximum comfort and protection for your Miniature horse! CLB cushion pads fit inside your Cavallo Hoof Boots in sizes M1–M4 (slim and regular soles). Made from a specially formulated microcellular foam compound , these pads provide exceptional cushioning that absorbs shock and concussion, reducing stress on hooves, joints, and legs. Due to their soft, forgiving design, Cushion Pads are ideal for acute situations, such as laminitis, founder, sole injuries, or other emergency cases where the horse requires immediate comfort and relief. They are highly effective during rehabilitation, offering soft, supportive comfort for sensitive hooves. Features Cavallo’s softest hoof boot pads for ultimate comfort Made from shock-absorbing microcellular foam compound 5mm thick Fits Cavallo CLB Hoof Boots sizes M1–M4 (slim and regular soles) Removable insole cushions hooves and legs from concussion Ideal for acute laminitis, founder, hoof injuries, abscesses, bruising, and contracted heels Helps improve circulation and reduce fatigue during recovery Can be used to tighten boot fit when needed Sold in pairs The Cavallo Cushion Pad is also available in 7-10 (BFB) and 0-6 (Horse) Sizes. title: Cavallo Hoof Boot Cushion Pads - size 0-6 (Sold in pairs)
text: Cavallo Cushion Pads – Sold in Pairs Cavallo Cushion Pads are Cavallo’s softest hoof boot pads, designed to deliver maximum comfort and protection inside your Cavallo Hoof Boots (sizes 0–6). Made from a specially formulated microcellular foam compound , these pads provide exceptional cushioning that absorbs shock and concussion, reducing stress on hooves, joints, and legs. Due to their soft, forgiving design, Cushion Pads are ideal for acute situations, such as laminitis, founder, sole injuries, or other emergency cases where the horse requires immediate comfort and relief. They are highly effective during rehabilitation, offering gentle, supportive comfort for sensitive hooves. Cavallo recommends the 10mm Cushion Pad for maximum comfort and support in therapy and emergency use.
